sentence: I think we can _______ the extra hour it will take.  We can only _______ to buy a small car at the moment.
Grapes _______ wine.  Olives _______ oil.  The earth affords fruit.  The sea affords an abundant supply of fish.
definition: To incur, stand, or bear without serious detriment, as an act which might under other circumstances be injurious;—with an auxiliary, as can, could, might, etc.; to be able or rich enough.
To offer, provide, or supply, as in selling, granting, expending, with profit, or without loss or too great injury.
To give forth; to supply, yield, or produce as the natural result, fruit, or issue.
